title: podospermum calcitrapifolium
intro: Podospermum calcitrapifolium, also known as the yellow thistle or prickly lettuces, is a plant species within the Cichorieae tribe of the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Podospermum calcitrapifolium include its potential use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Podospermum calcitrapifolium can be found in the form of infusions or tinctures, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
